text:
TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): IP base 
SNF base 
HH base 
OP base 
Carrier base 
DME base 

VALUES: 0 = Non-payment/zero claims 
1 = Admit thru discharge claim 
2 = Interim – first claim 
3 = Interim – continuing claim 
4 = Interim – last claim 
5 = Late charge(s) only claim 
6 = Reserved for national assignment 
7 = Replacement of prior claim 
8 = Void/cancel prior claim 
9 = Final claim (for HH PPS = process 
as a debit/credit to RAP
